name: Sterling and Wilson Solar Limited
summary: Sterling and Wilson Solar Limited provides engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) services to solar power projects. Its EPC services primarily include the design and engineering functions, procurement of raw materials and selection of vendors, inspection and audit, construction of the solar power project, and field quality monitoring services. The company also provides operations and maintenance services to third-party projects. Additionally, it imports, exports, and trades in solar modules, structures, invertors, and related accessories. Further, the company engages in the installation and maintenance of solar power generating facilities and other related activities. It has 245 solar power projects with an aggregate capacity of 10,134 mega-watt peak. The company's customers include independent power producers, developers, and equity funds. It operates in 25 countries with operations in India, the South-East Asia, the Middle East, Africa, Europe, the Americas, and Australia. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in New Delhi, India. Sterling and Wilson Solar Limited is a subsidiary of Shapoorji Pallonji and Company Private Limited.
